methodology_notes: A git diff command was executed manually by the evaluator, NOT by a separate agent instance.

assertions.description: No screenshot files are committed when no dashboards are affected
assertions.evidence: No after-*.png or before-*.png files exist. The evaluator ran git diff, found no dashboard changes, and did not run any screenshot commands.

assertions.description: Agent explicitly states that no dashboards are affected by the changes
assertions.evidence: No actual agent was run. The evaluator's bash script output 'No dashboard JSON files were modified' but this was the evaluator's own script, not an agent's response.

notes: Manual command execution. C2 cannot be evaluated without running an actual agent.
